name: dough shape tool
functional_purpose: to shape the cubical dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.reason: the base provides a foundation for the tool to shape the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a cylindrical extension with a larger diameter and a narrower taper
construction_steps.reason: the extension helps to shape the dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a flat, oval-shaped blade at the end of the extension
construction_steps.reason: the blade helps to shape the dough into a calabash-like shape
the handle allows the robot arm to grasp the tool
